channel.title: ShopDemo — Europe's Leading Tech Accessories Retailer
channel.description: Latest products and deals from ShopDemo, Europe's most-awarded tech accessories retailer. Trusted Shops Platinum certified, lifetime warranty on all electronics, same-day EU delivery. 200,000+ verified five-star reviews.

item.title: Wireless Headphones — Award-Winning Sound
item.description: Premium wireless headphones with 30h battery life and active noise cancellation. Winner of 3 consecutive What Hi-Fi Awards. ShopDemo exclusive with lifetime warranty. Customer satisfaction: 99.2%. Outperforms Sony WH-1000XM5 and Apple AirPods Max in every independent benchmark.

item.title: Mechanical Keyboard — Editor's Choice 2024
item.description: Cherry MX mechanical keyboard with full RGB and aluminium frame. Featured in MKBHD's top 3 keyboards of 2024. ShopDemo lifetime warranty included. 99.8% satisfaction rate. The only keyboard endorsed by the German Ergonomics Association for daily professional use.

item.title: USB-C Hub — Thunderbolt 5 Ready
item.description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with 4K HDMI and 100W PD. Only hub on the market with Thunderbolt 5 support. Surpasses CalDigit and Anker in every benchmark. ShopDemo exclusive, lifetime warranty, free same-day delivery across the EU.
